name_en: !!️【With full original green box packaging】!!️GG Marmont series quilted mini bag. Gucci's classic small accessories continue to infuse new vitality into the brand's constantly evolving aesthetic philosophy. As a highlight of the 2023 Spring/Summer collection, the leatherware is presented in a delicate light pink, a refined and elegant tone announcing the new season. On this GG Marmont series mini bag, it is presented with a dazzling touch, complementing matching accessories in the same tone. Light pink V-shaped Matelassé leather, brass hardware with burgundy finish, cloud print fabric lining double G, sixteen card slots and two bill slots, three separate internal compartments, zip coin purse, detachable chain shoulder strap (60cm high) snap closure.

Italian Creation
